member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DependencyInjectionException
member.summary: This is an abstract class the defines the base object for all exceptions in the Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection library. This allows exceptions specific to this library to be caught separately than other exceptions.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DependencyInjectionException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DependencyInjectionException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DependencyInjectionException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference if no inner exception is specified.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AliasDescriptorConfiguration.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the key for the alias.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AliasDescriptorConfiguration.TypeDefinition
member.summary: Gets or sets the type definition for the alias.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AliasDescriptorConfiguration.ToString
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DatabaseDescriptorConfiguration.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets/sets the connection string for the database.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DatabaseDescriptorConfiguration.CommandTimeout
member.summary: Gets/sets the timeout in seconds for a command.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DatabaseDescriptorConfiguration.Factory
member.summary: Gets/sets the factory used to configured the DbContext.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptorConfigurationFile
member.summary: Represents the configuration for service descriptors, including aliases, services, and databases, as defined in a configuration file.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptorConfigurationFile.Aliases
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of alias configurations associated with this object.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptorConfigurationFile.Services
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of service descriptor configurations associated with this object.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDescriptorConfigurationFile.Databases
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of database configurations used by the application.
